name: io.github.mintcloud/loopclub
title: loopclub — Jam with Claude
description: Describe a beat, get a playable link to loopclub — the drum machine the internet plays together.

environmentVariables.name: LOOPCLUB_ORIGIN
environmentVariables.description: Origin baked into the ?jam= links the server emits. Defaults to the live app; point it at a preview deployment to test.
